name: pf-finance
description: PersonalFi MCP Server — connect your AI assistant to your personal finance data. Ask questions in plain English: spending, budgets, net worth, goals, investments, cash flow, and more.

read.name: get_account_balances
read.description: Returns current balances for all accounts (checking, savings, credit cards, investment accounts). Includes account type, institution, and balance.

read.name: get_transactions
read.description: Retrieves transactions with optional filters: date range, account, category, amount range, or keyword. Returns paginated results.

read.name: search_transactions
read.description: Full-text search across transaction descriptions, merchant names, and notes. Use for 'find my Netflix charges' type queries.

read.name: get_budget_summary
read.description: Returns budget vs. actual spending for each category in the current (or specified) month. Includes over/under amounts and percent used.

read.name: get_spending_trends
read.description: Month-by-month spending breakdown by category over a date range. Useful for spotting trends and seasonal patterns.

read.name: get_net_worth
read.description: Calculates current net worth: total assets minus total liabilities. Broken down by account type.

read.name: get_net_worth_trend
read.description: Historical net worth snapshots over time. Shows how net worth has changed month by month.

read.name: get_income_statement
read.description: Income vs. expenses summary for a given period. Shows total income, total spending, and net cash flow.

read.name: get_categories
read.description: Lists all transaction categories with their icons and parent/child relationships.

read.name: get_goals
read.description: Returns all savings and debt payoff goals with current progress, target amounts, and projected completion dates.

read.name: get_loans
read.description: Returns loan and debt details including outstanding balance, interest rate, minimum payment, and payoff projections.

read.name: get_recurring_transactions
read.description: Identifies recurring transactions (subscriptions, bills, regular income) and their detected frequency.

read.name: get_cash_flow_forecast
read.description: Projects upcoming income and bills over the next 30–90 days based on recurring transaction patterns.

read.name: get_portfolio_summary
read.description: Investment portfolio overview: holdings, total value, unrealized gains/losses, and asset allocation breakdown.

read.name: get_financial_health_score
read.description: Composite score (0–100) across 6 components: savings rate, debt-to-income, emergency fund, budget adherence, net worth growth, and investment diversification.

read.name: get_spending_anomalies
read.description: Detects unusual transactions: one-time large charges, merchants you haven't used before, or categories significantly over their average.

read.name: get_subscription_summary
read.description: Lists detected recurring subscriptions with estimated monthly cost and last charge date.

read.name: get_spotlight_items
read.description: Returns actionable alerts and insights: upcoming bills, budget overruns, goal milestones, and anomalies worth reviewing.

read.name: get_weekly_recap
read.description: Summary of this week's spending vs. last week, top categories, and notable transactions.

read.name: get_transaction_rules
read.description: Lists saved auto-categorization rules (keyword → category mappings).

read.name: apply_rules_to_uncategorized
read.description: Runs categorization rules against all uncategorized transactions and returns how many were matched.

write.name: add_transaction
write.description: Creates a new transaction. Requires: date, description, amount, account ID. Optional: category, notes.

write.name: categorize_transaction
write.description: Sets or updates the category for a specific transaction by ID.

write.name: set_budget
write.description: Creates or updates a monthly budget amount for a category.

write.name: add_goal
write.description: Creates a new savings or debt payoff goal with target amount and optional deadline.

write.name: add_account
write.description: Adds a new financial account (bank, credit card, investment, loan).

write.name: add_snapshot
write.description: Records a net worth snapshot for historical tracking. Useful for accounts without automatic balance updates.

security.description: Requires the user to be logged in. Cloud mode uses session-based auth. Self-hosted mode requires the database to be unlocked. No bank credentials are stored — data comes from manual imports (CSV, OFX).
